ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading day */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of stocks traded */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* The adjusted closing price, accounting for corporate actions */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* The volume-weighted average price of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region where the stock is listed */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* The official website of the company */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the stock information was last updated */,
  "is_index" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the stock is part of a market index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "traders" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader */,
  "trader_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trader */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the trader (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the trader for additional contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the trader */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* The date when the trader joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the trader's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader who set the alert */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol associated with the alert */,
  "alert_condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value to trigger the alert */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status of the alert (active or inactive) */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume, news) */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS, push notification) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* The date and time when the alert was last triggered */,
  "trigger_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the alert has been triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader making the transaction */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol for the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (buy/sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the shares were traded */,
  "commission" REAL /* The commission fee charged for the transaction */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The exchange where the transaction took place */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader who owns the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the watchlist was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the watchlist was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_stocks" (
  "watchlist_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watchlist */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol included in the watchlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* The date and time when the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the stock in the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_stocks_watchlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("watchlist_id") REFERENCES watchlists ("watchlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the event information (e.g., news article, company press release) */,
  "impact_type" TEXT /* The type of impact (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event affecting stock prices */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol affected by the event */,
  "expected_impact" REAL /* Expected impact on the stock price */,
  "actual_impact" REAL /* Actual impact on the stock price after the event */,
  "impact_duration" TEXT /* The duration of the impact (e.g., short-term, long-term) */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_impact_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_impact_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES market_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., trader, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the role was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the permission */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Specific permission granted to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the permission was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
